note:

  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to prepare mechanically stable self-assembled peptides hydrogels. The goal is to investigate the properties and stability of these hydrogels under different conditions.",

  ],
  "tools_and_setup": [
    "A pipette, syringe, test tubes, a beaker, and a centrifuge are used in the experiment.",

    "Concentrations of calcium ions are added to the solution.",
    "The pH of the solution is adjusted using a pH meter."
